title: The Phantom Menace
content: This film introduced Darth Maul, whose double-bladed lightsaber became one of the most iconic weapons in Star Wars history.

title: Attack of the Clones
content: This was the first Star Wars movie shot almost entirely with digital cameras instead of traditional film.

title: Revenge of the Sith
content: This episode shows Anakin Skywalker's tragic transformation into Darth Vader, a turning point for the entire saga.

title: A New Hope
content: Originally released simply as 'Star Wars' in 1977, it became a global phenomenon and launched the franchise.

title: The Empire Strikes Back
content: The famous revelation 'I am your father' is considered one of the biggest plot twists in movie history.

title: Return of the Jedi
content: The Ewoks were partly inspired by the appearance and behavior of real-life teddy bears.
